2603.18528.title: Correlation-Weighted Multi-Reward Optimization for Compositional Generation
2603.18528.paper_summary: Text-to-image models produce images that align well with natural language prompts, but compositional generation has long been a central challenge. Models often struggle to satisfy multiple concepts within a single prompt, frequently omitting some concepts and resulting in partial success. Such failures highlight the difficulty of jointly optimizing multiple concepts during reward optimization, where competing concepts can interfere with one another. To address this limitation, we propose Correlation-Weighted Multi-Reward Optimization (\ours), a framework that leverages the correlation structure among concept rewards to adaptively weight each attribute concept in optimization. By accounting for interactions among concepts, \ours balances competing reward signals and emphasizes concepts that are partially satisfied yet inconsistently generated across samples, improving compositional generation. Specifically, we decompose multi-concept prompts into pre-defined concept groups (\eg, objects, attributes, and relations) and obtain reward signals from dedicated reward models for each concept. We then adaptively reweight these rewards, assigning higher weights to conflicting or hard-to-satisfy concepts using correlation-based difficulty estimation. By focusing optimization on the most challenging concepts within each group, \ours encourages the model to consistently satisfy all requested attributes simultaneously. We apply our approach to train state-of-the-art diffusion models, SD3.5 and FLUX.1-dev, and demonstrate consistent improvements on challenging multi-concept benchmarks, including ConceptMix, GenEval 2, and T2I-CompBench.
2603.18528.paper_summary_zh: 文本到圖像的模型生成的圖像與自然語言提示高度一致，但組合生成長期以來一直是一個主要挑戰。模型經常難以在單一提示中滿足多個概念，經常省略某些概念，導致部分成功。這些失敗突顯了在獎勵優化過程中共同優化多個概念的困難，其中競爭概念可能會相互干擾。為了解決這一限制，我們提出了相關加權多獎勵優化（\ours），這是一個利用概念獎勵之間相關結構來自適應性加權每個屬性概念的優化框架。通過考慮概念之間的相互作用，\ours平衡了競爭的獎勵信號，並強調那些部分滿足但在樣本中生成不一致的概念，從而改善了組合生成。具體而言，我們將多概念提示分解為預定義的概念組（例如，物體、屬性和關係），並從每個概念的專用獎勵模型中獲取獎勵信號。然後，我們自適應地重新加權這些獎勵，對衝突或難以滿足的概念分配更高的權重，使用基於相關性的難度估計。通過將優化重點放在每個組中最具挑戰性的概念上，\ours鼓勵模型同時一致地滿足所有請求的屬性。我們將我們的方法應用於訓練最先進的擴散模型，SD3.5和FLUX.1-dev，並在挑戰性的多概念基準上顯示出一致的改進，包括ConceptMix、GenEval 2和T2I-CompBench。
2603.18528.author: Jungmyung Wi et.al.
2603.18528.authors: Jungmyung Wi, Hyunsoo Kim, Donghyun Kim
